subcodes.first_line: Thou hast made mention of thy Lord time and time again, and mention hath been made of thee by the Most Exalted Pen again and again. Act thou according to that which We have enjoined upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکرت ربک مره بعد مره و ذکرت من القلم الاعلی کره بعد کره ان اعمل ما وصیناک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @service to others; to the Cause of God
